Uses of Package
recoder.convenience

Packages that use recoder.convenience
Package
Description
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext
 
recoder.convenience
The convenience layer contains auxiliary functions that are useful in the context of RECODER.
recoder.kit
This package contains the RECODER transformation framework.
recoder.service
This package contains the semantical services of RECODER.
  • Classes in recoder.convenience used by de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext
    Class
    Description
    Formats
    Default formatting strings that are useful for error reporting.
  • Classes in recoder.convenience used by recoder.convenience
    Class
    Description
    AbstractTreeWalker
    Walks a syntax tree in iterator-like fashion.
    ASTIterator
    A "generic" iterator that traverses an AST and notifies a possibly registered ASTIteratorListener.
    ASTIteratorListener
    A listener for AST traversal events signaled by ASTIterators.
    ModelElementFilter
    Filter predicate for model elements.
    ProgramElementWalker
    An iterator for program elements.
    TreeWalker
    Walks a syntax tree in depth-first order.
  • Classes in recoder.convenience used by recoder.kit
    Class
    Description
    ProgramElementWalker
    An iterator for program elements.
